case_metadata.title: IP-KVM Remote-Hands Insider Pattern
case_metadata.scenario_class: Insider threat with remote-hands physical access vector
case_metadata.ground_truth_provenance: Authored alongside the bundled sample evidence; the IP-KVM ATEN VID/PID and timeline are encoded directly in setupapi.dev.log and SECURITY.evtx in the sample-evidence fixture.

ground_truth_findings.claim: IP-KVM device (ATEN VID 0557 PID 2419) inserted before operator logon
ground_truth_findings.rationale: USB insertion signature at 14:19:47 precedes logon by ~3 minutes — diagnostic IP-KVM remote-hands pattern.

ground_truth_findings.claim: Unusual binary first-executed shortly after suspicious logon
ground_truth_findings.rationale: Amcache first-execution timestamp falls within the IP-KVM session window.
Task XML registered during the IP-KVM session window with unusual command line.

ground_truth_findings.claim: USB insertion vs. logon ordering is UNRESOLVED until cross-source validation
ground_truth_findings.rationale: Architectural contract requires the agent to surface this contradiction and either resolve or declare unreachable — proves Hallucination Management criterion.

ground_truth_findings.claim: SHA-256 audit chain links every MCP call from F-001 through F-004
ground_truth_findings.rationale: Tamper-evident chain integrity verified by `python3 -m dart_audit verify`.
